lyrics_lrc:
[00:07.66]Shake the shells, shake the shells!
[00:09.36]Shaka-shaka shells — feels so swell!
[00:11.48]Pick 'em up, shake 'em loud,
[00:12.20]Shake those shells with the Sea Star crowd!
[00:15.22]Shake the shells, shake the shells!
[00:16.86]Shaka-shaka shells — feels so swell!
[00:18.94]Side to side, up and down,
[00:20.56]Shake those shells all around the town!
[00:22.70]Shake, shake, shake, shake — shake the shells!
[00:23.68]Shake, shake, shake, shake — shake the shells!
